title: A New Plan for Nuclear Power in America
summary: This article talks about how the government is changing the rules for nuclear power in America. A young lawyer named Seth Cohen, who works for the Department of Energy, led a meeting at a big lab in Idaho. He said that the Nuclear Regulatory Commission, which makes sure nuclear plants are safe, will do what the government tells it to do. Some people at the meeting were worried about safety, especially for babies and pregnant women, but Cohen did not seem to care much. The Trump administration wants to build more nuclear power plants to help with artificial intelligence, so they are making new rules quickly. Silicon Valley companies, which have a lot of money, are helping with this plan. This is making some experts nervous because they think safety is very important.

options: It will do what the government says
questions.correct_answer: It will do what the government says

background_read: Nuclear power is a way to make electricity without burning coal or oil, which can be cleaner but needs careful rules to keep people safe. The government has agencies like the Nuclear Regulatory Commission to check that nuclear plants are built and run safely. In America, leaders sometimes change rules to build things faster, especially for new technologies like artificial intelligence. This article shows how a young lawyer is helping make these changes, but some experts are worried it might not be safe enough.
Article_Structure: WHO: Seth Cohen, a young lawyer from the Department of Energy, and the Trump administration.
WHAT: Changing rules for nuclear power to build more plants quickly, with help from Silicon Valley companies.
WHERE: At the Idaho National Laboratory and in government offices in America.
WHY: To get more energy for artificial intelligence, but some people are concerned about safety.

perspectives.description: Wants to speed up nuclear power to support new technology.
Worries that fast changes might risk people's health.
